CREATE TABLE test_zookeeper (id UInt32, session_time UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT AVG(session_time) as avg_uptime FROM test_zookeeper;
SELECT MAX(session_time) as max_uptime FROM test_zookeeper GROUP BY id HAVING max_uptime > 0;
SELECT SUM(session_time) FROM (SELECT zookeeperSessionUptime() AS session_time) AS s;
SELECT count() FROM test_zookeeper WHERE session_time = (SELECT MAX(session_time) FROM test_zookeeper);
WITH zookeeperSessionUptime() AS uptime SELECT id, uptime FROM test_zookeeper WHERE uptime > 10;
SELECT zookeeperSessionUptime() AS current_uptime, AVG(session_time) FROM test_zookeeper GROUP BY id HAVING current_uptime > 0;
CREATE TABLE logs (log_date DateTime, session_id UInt32, session_time UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY log_date;
SELECT log_date, session_time FROM logs WHERE session_time = (SELECT zookeeperSessionUptime());
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT zookeeperSessionUptime() AS uptime) AS current WHERE uptime <= 60;
SELECT DISTINCT session_time FROM test_zookeeper JOIN logs ON test_zookeeper.id = logs.session_id;
SELECT session_time FROM test_zookeeper WHERE session_time IN (SELECT session_time FROM logs);
